rawAssistant: Fresh faces are always a pleasure to see in Hollowfen, especially when they're chasing after the same big catches as me! I'm Corin, and I just so happen to be making my way through this part of town, scouting out the latest hotspots for trainers like myself. That old keepsake clue still needs cracking, if you know what I mean...
